creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
I cannot confirm the amavisd.pid bug, since my default amavisd-new
directory points to /var/spool/amavisd which is correct set for me.

Do you have installed the port with binary from ftp or build by yourself?

If you run amavisd-new chrooted then your path is correct, if not the path
in the port is correct.

Can you check the path in the following files
  - /usr/local/sbin/amavisd
  - /usr/local/etc/amavisd-conf

and also the parameter in amavisd.conf
  $MYHOME = '/var/spool/amavis';   # a convenient default for other settings, -H
  # $pid_file  = "$MYHOME/var/spool/amavisd.pid";   # -P

Notice the comment in front of the pid_file parameter by default!

Regards,
   olli

PS:
I send another PR for a portupdate to v2.5.3
